display.purpose: Logo, drawer titles, Overview heading. Serif, rare.

body.purpose: All UI text, messages, descriptions. System sans-serif.

mono.purpose: Code, paths, model names, metadata. Never body paragraphs.

overline.purpose: Group headers, section labels. Uppercase + letter-spacing.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Send action, primary CTA. Accent background, white text, square radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(64% 0.13 28); color: #fff; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(64% 0.13 28); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default button style. Transparent with border, muted text. Hover reveals accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); padding: 5px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(64% 0.13 28); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: 34x34px square icon button for header toolbar. Active state with accent tint.
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); background: transparent; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-btn-icon.active { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(64% 0.13 28); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: Notification Pill
components.description: Pill-shaped notification button in header. Done and alert variants with dot badge.
components.css: .ds-notif-btn { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 5px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); border-radius: 100px; background: transparent; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); font-size: 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-notif-btn:hover { background: oklch(97% 0.018 70); color: oklch(22% 0.02 50); border-color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); } .ds-notif-btn--done:hover { background: oklch(95% 0.06 145); color: oklch(70% 0.18 145); border-color: oklch(70% 0.18 145); } .ds-notif-btn--alert:hover { background: oklch(93% 0.06 25); color: oklch(62% 0.2 25); border-color: oklch(62% 0.2 25); } .ds-notif-dot { position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 2px solid oklch(99% 0.008 70); } .ds-notif-dot--done { background: oklch(70% 0.18 145); } .ds-notif-dot--alert { background: oklch(62% 0.2 25); animation: pulse-dot 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse-dot { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.15); } }

components.name: Message Bubble (User)
components.description: User message. Right-aligned, accent-light background, asymmetric radius.
components.html:
用户

帮我重构 auth 模块
components.css: .ds-msg { max-width: 80%; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 12px; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-msg--user { align-self: flex-end; background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; } .ds-msg__role { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); margin-bottom: 3px; text-align: right; } .ds-msg__role--user { text-align: right; } .ds-msg__body p { margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-msg__body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .ds-msg__body code { background: oklch(97% 0.018 70); padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.88em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; }

components.name: Message Bubble (Assistant)
components.description: Assistant message. Left-aligned, surface background with border.
components.html:
助手

好的，这个任务比较复杂，我分解成几个子任务并行执行。
components.css: .ds-msg--bot { align-self: flex-start; background: oklch(99% 0.008 70); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; } .ds-msg__role--bot { text-align: left; }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Stacked textarea + toolbar inside a rounded container. Focus lifts shadow and shifts border to accent.
components.html:
sonnet @ anthropic

components.css: .ds-chat-input { background: oklch(99% 0.008 70); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); overflow: visible; } .ds-chat-input:focus-within { border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-chat-input__field { display: block; width: 100%; min-height: calc(1.45em * 2 + 16px); max-height: calc(1.45em * 10 + 16px); padding: 10px 14px 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(22% 0.02 50); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; resize: none; outline: none; } .ds-chat-input__field::placeholder { color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); } .ds-chat-input__toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 8px 6px; } .ds-tb-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 8px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); font-size: 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); gap: 4px; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tb-btn:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-tb-btn--plus { width: 28px; padding: 0; } .ds-tb-btn--send { background: oklch(64% 0.13 28); color: white; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-tb-btn--send:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-tb-model { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 8px; height: 28px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 11px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; color: oklch(22% 0.02 50); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tb-model:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-tb-context { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 6px; height: 28px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tb-context__bar { width: 40px; height: 4px; background: oklch(90% 0.014 70); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-tb-context__fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: oklch(64% 0.13 28); transition: width 0.3s ease; } .ds-tb-spacer { flex: 1; }

components.name: Session List Item
components.description: Sidebar session item with left border activation indicator and status dot.
components.html: auth 模块重构2m
components.css: .ds-session-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 14px 7px 24px; cursor: pointer; border-left: 3px solid transparent; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); user-select: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-session-item:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); } .ds-session-item.active { background: oklch(92% 0.04 28); border-left-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); } .ds-session-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; background: oklch(90% 0.014 70); } .ds-session-dot--run { background: oklch(70% 0.18 145); animation: dot-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes dot-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } } .ds-session-title { flex: 1; font-size: 13px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; color: oklch(22% 0.02 50); } .ds-session-item.active .ds-session-title { color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); font-weight: 600; } .ds-session-meta { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); white-space: nowrap; }

components.css: .ds-overview-card { background: oklch(99% 0.008 70); border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.95); animation: card-enter 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) forwards; } @keyframes card-enter { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } } .ds-overview-card:hover { border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } .ds-overview-card.highlighted { border-color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(64% 0.13 28 / 0.4); } .ds-overview-card__preview { height: 110px; background: oklch(97% 0.018 70); padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); overflow: hidden; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.014 70); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; } .ds-preview-line { margin-bottom: 3px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-preview-line--user { color: oklch(64% 0.13 28); font-weight: 600; } .ds-overview-card__footer { padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-overview-card__title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 2px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: oklch(22% 0.02 50); } .ds-overview-card__project { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-overview-card__meta { display: flex; gap: 10px; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); flex-wrap: wrap; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; } .ds-card-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-card-badge--run { background: oklch(95% 0.06 145); color: oklch(70% 0.18 145); } .ds-card-badge--pause { background: oklch(95% 0.06 85); color: oklch(78% 0.15 85); } .ds-card-badge--idle { background: oklch(90% 0.014 70); color: oklch(50% 0.018 50); } .ds-card-badge__dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; }

narrative.overview: A desk you sit at for six hours. Not a dashboard you glance at for thirty seconds. Every decision serves stamina: low contrast, warm neutrals, generous whitespace, and transitions so gentle you barely notice them. The visual system is restrained to the point of austerity, except for one warm terracotta accent that appears only where action is required. The interface rejects the cold precision of traditional developer tools and the sterile minimalism of chat-first AI products. It borrows warmth from editorial print design, structure from desktop publishing software, and feedback clarity from observability dashboards, without becoming any of those things.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (terracotta), used on less than 10% of any screen
OKLch color space for perceptually uniform warmth across light and dark themes
Serif display font for brand identity only; everything else is system sans-serif
No gradients, no glassmorphism, no decorative shadows
All surfaces tinted toward the brand hue; never pure black or white

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on less than 10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If a screen has more than 2 accent-colored elements, something is wrong.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral carries a trace of the brand hue (chroma 0.005–0.01 is enough). This is what makes the interface feel warm rather than clinical.

rules.name: The Display Rarity Rule
rules.body: The serif display font appears no more than 3 times per screen. It is a brand flourish, not a workhorse.

rules.name: The Mono Containment Rule
rules.body: Monospace is never used for body paragraphs. It is exclusively for code, file paths, model names, token counts, and IDs.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state: hover elevation, focus lift, menu popup, toast arrival. If a card has a shadow while at rest, it is wrong.

dos: Do use OKLch for all colors. The perceptual uniformity matters for warmth.
Do keep the accent terracotta to less than 10% of any screen surface.
Do use the display serif font for the logo, drawer titles, and Overview heading only.
Do animate with cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) (Material standard easing) for all transitions.
Do use 8px base grid for spacing. Vary padding for rhythm.
Do cap body text line length at 65–75ch.
Do use tonal layering (bg → surface) to convey depth instead of default shadows.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion by disabling pulse animations and simplifying transitions.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff. Tint every neutral toward the brand hue.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients). Use a single solid color.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent on cards or alerts).
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. Blurs are rare and purposeful, or nothing.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids (same icon + heading + text repeated endlessly).
Don't use modals as a first choice for new information. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring animations. Ease-out with exponential curves only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
